turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para motivos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Uh, I’m not sure, I just called Pivot Point Orthopaedics. I’m trying to book a shoulder appointment—did I reach the right place?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Can you please provide your full name and date of birth?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, sure. It’s Leen Alharbi, and my date of birth is August 30th, 1991.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: What is your date of birth?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is this appointment for a new issue with your shoulder?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: a follow-up from a previous visit or something else?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: It’s something new, kind of recent. My shoulder’s been acting up the last couple weeks.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, so can we find a time

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: you'd like to book an appointment for a new recent shoulder issue.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Do you have a specific provider you'd like to see or are you open to the first available?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: I’m cool with the first available, as long as it’s someone who knows shoulders.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Let me check for the soonest available appointments for your recent shoulder issue.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sorry, could you repeat that? I didn’t catch it.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like me to look for openings later next week?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Or would you prefer to have someone from the clinic?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Actually, I’m open to anyone from the clinic who can take me soon.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I found several openings for shoulder appointments tomorrow, June 30th.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you prefer morning or afternoon?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I can share a few specific times.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: That’d be great, let’s hear them.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would any of these work for you?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: I was actually hoping for an afternoon slot.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: For tomorrow afternoon, I have 1 p.m. or 115 p.m.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, I think 3 p.m. with Dr. Kelly Noble works for me.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Your shoulder appointment is set for Tuesday, June 30th at 3 p.m. with Dr. Kelly Noble at Pivot Point Orthopedics.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: please bring your photo ID, insurance card.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: a list of your current medications, and any imaging discs you have.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like directions or need anything else?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: No, I think I’m all set. Thanks for your help.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: You're all set for your appointment.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: If you need anything else, just give us a call.
